description: Create the server-side API route /api/solar/insights that proxies requests to Google Solar API buildingInsights endpoint with rate limiting, and set up the environment variable.
steps: Add GOOGLE_SOLAR_API_KEY entry to /projects/sandbox/cost-smart/.env.example with a comment explaining it is for Google Solar API

Create /projects/sandbox/cost-smart/app/api/solar/insights/route.ts with a POST handler that: (a) accepts { latitude, longitude } in body, validates they are valid numbers, (b) implements rate limiting using in-memory Map keyed by IP address (from request headers x-forwarded-for or x-real-ip), allowing 3 requests/day for free users and 30/day for pro users, (c) checks pro status by accepting optional subscriptionId or email in the body and verifying via the existing paypal verification pattern in lib/paypal.ts, (d) calls https://solar.googleapis.com/v1/buildingInsights:findClosest?location.latitude={lat}&location.longitude={lng}&requiredQuality=HIGH&key={GOOGLE_SOLAR_API_KEY}, (e) returns a structured JSON response with the solar potential data, (f) handles errors gracefully returning appropriate HTTP status codes

The rate limit store should be a simple Map<string, { count: number, date: string }> that resets daily. This is acceptable for a single-instance deployment on Vercel (serverless functions reset naturally).
Follow the pattern in app/api/ai-insights/route.ts for request handling, Pro verification, and response format
acceptance_criteria: File app/api/solar/insights/route.ts exists and exports a POST handler
The API key is read from process.env.GOOGLE_SOLAR_API_KEY (server-side only, no NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix)
Rate limiting returns 429 status with a clear message when limit exceeded
The route calls the Google Solar API buildingInsights endpoint correctly
The response includes solar potential data (panel count, capacity, annual energy, financial analysis)
Pro users get higher rate limits (30/day vs 3/day)
verification: Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/cost-smart && pnpm build' and confirm it compiles without errors
